classification: BATCH 2R CODE COMPLETE — OWNER VISUAL APPROVAL REQUIRED

staging.detail: The target Worker was not deployed because Wrangler authentication is unavailable.
requiredBeforeLiveClaim: Deploy nusacanvas-space from the committed configuration using authenticated Wrangler.
Run npm run verify:staging against the target workers.dev origin.
Run the live Playwright smoke test against the target origin.
Record target headers, cache policy, noindex, 404, and external-request checks.

cleanInstall.detail: The supplied Node 24 runtime has no npm executable. npm ci could not be run without changing the lockfile through a different package manager; existing lockfile-resolved dependencies were used for all local gates.

nextRequiredAction: Run the owner validation protocol, record approval or defects, and do not resume Batch 3 Prompt 2 until that approval artifact exists.
